Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO LOCAL GOVERNMENT

Title: Authorizes Simcray Holdings, LLC. to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
Summary: Authorizes Simcray Holdings, LLC. to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status for the 2023, 2024 and 2025 assessment rolls and all of the 2023-2024, 2024-2025 and 2025-2026 school taxes.
ActClause: AN ACT authorizing Simcray Holdings, LLC. to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
